prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: high-fidelity clean iPhone onboarding screen, portrait, no device frame
Primary request: Create a Mobbin-informed clean anime iPhone onboarding screen for WakeSaga. Screen 1: Cold Open / fast start. Inspired by common social and habit onboarding patterns: one promise, one hero, one CTA.
Required readable UI text only: "WakeSaga", "Tomorrow becomes Episode 001", "Turn your alarm into your first win of the day", "Build My Opening".
Visual language: native iPhone onboarding, generous whitespace, one original anime sunrise protagonist illustration, warm off-white background, black type, coral CTA, subtle cyan/gold accents. App UI first, anime as emotional identity.
Composition/framing: safe-area top, simple brand, large hero image, large headline, one short subhead, bottom CTA. Max 3 UI zones.
Constraints: no dense manga collage, no multiple cards, no fake Japanese text, no copyrighted anime IP, no random stats, no fake social proof, no RPG HUD, no neon AI gradient, no overlapping text, no watermark.

Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: high-fidelity clean iPhone onboarding screen, portrait, no device frame
Primary request: Create a Mobbin-informed clean anime iPhone onboarding screen for WakeSaga. Screen 2: Morning Enemy. Inspired by BFF/NGL-style prompt cards: one casual question and four large choices.
Required readable UI text only: "What beats you after the alarm?", "Warm bed", "Phone spiral", "Low mood", "Late panic", "Next".
Visual language: friendly iPhone quiz UI, large tap cards, one small original anime rival avatar, warm cream background, black text, coral selected state, cyan/gold icons. Social prompt-card feeling without copying any app.
Composition/framing: progress stage label "Enemy" at top, big question, four spacious choice cards, bottom CTA. Max 4 UI zones.
Constraints: no dense quiz wall, no tiny badges, no fake Japanese text, no copied BFF/Trip branding, no copyrighted anime IP, no random metrics, no overlapping text, no watermark.

Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: high-fidelity clean iPhone onboarding screen, portrait, no device frame
Primary request: Create a Mobbin-informed clean anime iPhone onboarding payoff screen for WakeSaga. Screen 3: Rival Detected. After the user answers, the app shows the first personalized plan-building result.
Required readable UI text only: "Rival detected", "Phone spiral", "Your opening scene needs a real-world gate", "Continue".
Visual language: plan-building result reveal like habit/fitness onboarding, clean iPhone card, one original anime rival sticker/avatar, calm cream background, black type, coral accent, cyan status chip, subtle manga motion marks.
Composition/framing: progress at top, large result card in center, one simple explanation line, bottom CTA. Max 3 UI zones. It should feel rewarding, not scary.
Constraints: no fake score, no fake diagnosis, no dense stat dashboard, no fake Japanese text, no copyrighted anime IP, no RPG HUD, no neon gradient, no overlapping text, no watermark.

Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: high-fidelity clean iPhone onboarding education screen, portrait, no device frame
Primary request: Create a Mobbin-informed clean anime iPhone onboarding screen for WakeSaga. Screen 4: Saga Loop education. Inspired by common habit onboarding: a simple explain-why screen between questions.
Required readable UI text only: "The Saga Loop", "Alarm", "Wake Gate", "Morning Episode", "Move before your brain negotiates", "Continue".
Visual language: native iPhone education screen, three large step cards, warm off-white background, black type, coral/cyan/gold numbered icons, one small original anime mentor avatar, light manga border accent only.
Composition/framing: stage label "How it works" at top, concise title, 3-step vertical diagram, one sentence, sticky CTA. Max 4 UI zones.
Constraints: no dense infographic, no paragraph wall, no fake Japanese text, no copyrighted anime character, no fake metrics, no RPG HUD, no neon gradient, no overlapping text, no watermark.

Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: high-fidelity clean iPhone onboarding setup screen, portrait, no device frame
Primary request: Create a Mobbin-informed clean anime iPhone onboarding screen for WakeSaga. Screen 5: Choose Wake Gate. Inspired by common option-card setup flows: clear cards, big touch targets, one decision.
Required readable UI text only: "Choose your Wake Gate", "Stand up", "Drink water", "Desk photo", "Shoes on", "Sunlight", "Spoken vow", "Next".
Visual language: modern iPhone setup UI, six spacious rounded action cards, simple icons, soft cream surface, black typography, coral selected state, cyan/gold accents, small anime guide bubble.
Composition/framing: stage label "Gate" at top, one question, 2-column card grid, bottom CTA. Cards must be large, readable, and not crowded.
Constraints: no Wayk clone, no dense cards, no tiny labels, no fake Japanese text, no copyrighted anime IP, no random stats, no RPG HUD, no neon gradient, no overlapping text, no watermark.

Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: high-fidelity clean iPhone onboarding result screen, portrait, no device frame
Primary request: Create a Mobbin-informed clean anime iPhone onboarding result screen for WakeSaga. Screen 6: Opening Scene Ready. Inspired by Future/Fitbod/Duolingo-style result reveal before account/paywall.
Required readable UI text only: "Your Opening Scene is ready", "6:45 AM", "Wake Gate", "Stand up + water", "Narrator", "Mentor", "Mission", "Hard thing before noon", "Start Tomorrow".
Visual language: polished iPhone result reveal, one beautiful anime sunrise card, simple plan summary rows, warm off-white background, black type, coral CTA, cyan/gold accents. It should feel like the app built something personal.
Composition/framing: safe area top, title, large anime plan card, three compact summary rows, bottom CTA. Max 4 UI zones, screenshot-able but uncluttered.
Constraints: no dense receipt, no fake stats, no fake likes, no fake Japanese text, no copyrighted anime IP, no RPG HUD, no neon gradient, no overlapping text, no watermark.
